title: Service Application Engineer (Machinery/Automation)
description:
Job Scope:

- Assist in robot teaching and PLC program setup.

- Assist in machine assembly, electrical wiring, site installation, test and troubleshooting.

- Conduct factory acceptance test and site acceptance test.

- Conduct end-user operation and maintenance training.

- Ensure given tasks complete within given timeline.

- Perform system maintenance and support for system in production.

- Liaise with suppliers on components selection and quotation.

- Liaise with customers on on-site job.

- Involve in generating SOP for service and application team.

- Involved in generating and preparing the Preventive Maintenance checklist and costing.


Job Requirement:

- Minimum Diploma in Mechatronics, Robotics, Electrical Engineering or equivalent.

- Minimum 2 years of experience in PLC programming and machine troubleshooting.

- Ability to understand mechanical, electrical and pneumatic drawings.

- Proficient in Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, and Word is an advantage.

postedCompany.description:
Since its establishment in 2003, ASTech has focused on providing total system solutions to our valued customers. We design, manufacture and deploy both standard and customized systems for our customers to help them run their companies more effectively and efficiently. In addition, we had started our Malaysia manufacturing facility in May 2020 to support our valued customers in the region.

In the effort to enhance our commitment to support our customers, we had set up Quality Management System and had successfully achieved the certification standard of the International Organization for Standardization ISO 9001:2008 (UKAS) certification in October 2009 and it had upgraded to ISO 9001:2015 (UKAS) & ISO 9001:2015 (SAC).

ASTech had participated in the bizSAFE programme, to put in place workplace safety and health programmes such as Risk Management (RM) and Workplace Safety & Health Management System (WSHMS). ASTech had awarded bizSAFE certification in November 2009. We had upgraded to bizSAFE4 in Y2015.

ASTech evolves from customized automation solution provider in general industry sector to i4.0 Integrated Solution Provider in Precision Engineering Sector.

In conjunction with the inaugural Industrial Transformation ASIA-PACIFIC, a HANNOVER MESSE event, ASTech formed a new strategic alliance, Smart i4.0 Transformation Alliance (SiTA) with 14 companies on 16th Oct’ 18 with the support from Enterprise Singapore (ESG) and Singapore Precision Engineering Technology Association (SPETA). It has now grown to 21 companies.

With this alliance, it aims to create a complete eco-system for Industrial 4.0 transformation in Precision Engineering manufacturing in Singapore and Asia-Pacific and promote the adoption of Industrial 4.0 to increase manufacturing productivity. This alliance will be a big step forward to foster collaboration between local and international companies.
postedCompany.name: ASTECH PTE. LTD.
